meaning: n.(=nudist)天体运动者,裸体主义者(指认为裸体有益身心的人)
examples: The luxury naturist holiday spot opened its doors earlier this year.
But according to the owner of Britain's first naturist spa hotel, it's the perfect spot.
There are at least 12 naturist beaches in the Basque region, and many more all over the Spanish coast.
Halfway through the book many readers will feel they have read quite enough reverential descriptions of naturist and pagan cults in 1930s Britain.
The man who owns WilliamHague.com is actually a naturist and has a disclaimer on his site warning people that he is not the Conservative Party leader.
